summary: Comprehensive testing of TrendScout UK new features complete. All 17 backend tests pass (100%). Tested: Product Validator (public), Profit Simulator (public), Quick Launch (authenticated), CJ Sync, and UI/UX. All features working correctly with dark theme UI.

issues: Some 403 errors in console for external resources (Sentry, analytics) - not affecting functionality

seed_data_creation: None - used existing products in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) Product Validator at landing page hero section - returns score/signals/pricing, 2) Profit Simulator at /profit-simulator - sliders work, 30/60/90 projections with verdict, 3) Quick Launch at /quick-launch/:productId - returns AI ad copy, projections, platform exports (Shopify/WooCommerce/Etsy), 4) CJ Sync at POST /api/cj/sync - returns fetched/created/skipped counts. Dark theme uses bg-[#09090b] with emerald-500 accents.

test_results.POST /api/public/validate-product (phone: PASS - Returns success:true with launch_score, launch_label, signals, reasoning
test_results.POST /api/public/profit-simulator (basic: PASS - Returns unit_economics, projections (3 months), verdict
test_results.POST /api/cj/sync: PASS - Returns success:true with details.fetched, details.created, details.skipped
test_results.GET /api/public/trending-products: PASS - Returns products array with total count
test_results.GET /api/public/daily-picks: PASS - Returns picks array with date

ui_tests.Landing Page: PASS - Dark theme (bg-[#09090b]), hero section, product validator with search bar
ui_tests.Product Validator: PASS - Type 'phone case', click Check, shows score 34/Avoid with signals and pricing
ui_tests.Profit Simulator Page: PASS - Sliders work, Run Simulation shows 30/60/90 projections with verdict
ui_tests.Quick Launch Page: PASS - Shows Launch Pack Ready with ad copy, projections, platform exports tabs
ui_tests.Navigation: PASS - Dark header with emerald buttons, all links working
ui_tests.Footer: PASS - Product, Solutions, Compare, Company sections with 29 links

features_verified: Free Public Product Validator - instant scoring with signals
AI Profit Simulator - 30/60/90 day projections with UK VAT
One-Click Launch - AI ad copy + platform exports (Shopify/WooCommerce/Etsy)
Dark mode premium UI with emerald-500 accents

mocked_apis.AI/LLM: LIVE - Uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key for Quick Launch ad copy generation
mocked_apis.CJ Dropshipping: LIVE - All CJ API calls are against the real CJ Dropshipping API

notes: Quick Launch endpoint uses GPT-5.2 and may take 10-15 seconds to generate AI content. Product validator searches CJ Dropshipping for live supplier data. All public endpoints (validate-product, profit-simulator) work without authentication.
